title: Future Career Landscapes
html:
Future Career Landscapes

01

Shift in Core Competency

Transitioning from manual syntax coding to strategic prompt engineering and architectural orchestration.

02

AI-Augmented Roles

Emergence of "Centaur" professionals who blend domain expertise with AI acceleration for 10x productivity.

03

Continuous Adaptation

Shifting from "once-in-a-lifetime" education to lifelong learning cycles in a rapidly automating economy.
